evals.name: status-query-specific-module
evals.prompt: 登录功能做得怎么样了？我上次改了什么？项目在 f:/大模型项目/Synapse/Synapse-Solo/examples/solo-saas 目录下，里面有 MEMORY_MAP.md 和 meta/ 目录。帮我用 synapse-graph-memory skill 查询一下。
evals.expected_output: Agent reads MEMORY_MAP.md first, finds feat_login in Tag Index, loads meta/feat_login.md, reports status (in-progress) and last Change Log entry (2026-05-11: Natural-language memory ingestion)

assertions.name: reads-map-before-node
assertions.description: Agent reads MEMORY_MAP.md before reading any meta/*.md file

assertions.name: finds-correct-node
assertions.description: Agent identifies feat_login as the target node

assertions.name: reports-correct-status
assertions.description: Agent reports feat_login is in-progress

assertions.name: reports-last-change
assertions.description: Agent surfaces the last Change Log entry date

evals.name: pending-work-query
evals.prompt: 看看项目还有什么没做完的？项目路径：f:/大模型项目/Synapse/Synapse-Solo/examples/solo-saas
evals.expected_output: Agent reads MEMORY_MAP.md Progress Summary section only (~300 tokens), reports that 3 nodes are in-progress (feat_login, feat_subscription, feat_admin-notification), 5 are stable, 0 open issues. Suggests in-progress nodes as focus candidates.

assertions.name: reads-progress-summary-only
assertions.description: Agent reads Progress Summary without loading node files

assertions.name: reports-correct-counts
assertions.description: Agent reports 3 in-progress, 5 stable nodes

assertions.name: does-not-load-nodes
assertions.description: Agent stops at MAP level, doesn't load individual nodes for vague query

evals.name: cross-module-impact-check
evals.prompt: 我要改 mod_user-account 的用户套餐字段，会影响哪些功能？项目在 f:/大模型项目/Synapse/Synapse-Solo/examples/solo-saas
evals.expected_output: Agent reads MEMORY_MAP.md, finds mod_user-account, checks its blocks field. Reports that feat_subscription and feat_admin-notification both depend on mod_user-account. Agent then reads Connection Points from those blocking nodes to assess impact.

assertions.name: checks-blocks-before-modify
assertions.description: Agent reads blocks field from MEMORY_MAP for mod_user-account

assertions.name: identifies-downstream-consumers
assertions.description: Agent identifies feat_subscription and feat_admin-notification as dependents

assertions.name: identifies-second-downstream
assertions.description: Agent also identifies feat_admin-notification

evals.name: keyword-fallback-query
evals.prompt: 关于 /api/v1/auth/refresh 这个接口，项目里有哪些记忆节点记录过它？项目路径：f:/大模型项目/Synapse/Synapse-Solo/examples/solo-saas
evals.expected_output: Agent reads MEMORY_MAP.md, doesn't find tag match for 'refresh', falls back to Keyword Index, finds /api/v1/auth/refresh → mod_auth-api. Loads mod_auth-api and reports the endpoint info.

assertions.name: uses-keyword-index-fallback
assertions.description: Agent uses Keyword Index when tag match fails

assertions.name: finds-correct-node-via-keyword
assertions.description: Agent finds mod_auth-api via keyword index

assertions.name: reports-endpoint-details
assertions.description: Agent reports concrete endpoint details from the node

evals.name: compound-time-domain-query
evals.prompt: 最近两天订阅支付相关的改了什么？项目路径：f:/大模型项目/Synapse/Synapse-Solo/examples/solo-saas
evals.expected_output: Agent performs Filtered BFS: tag='subscription'/'payment' + date filter (recent 2 days from the MEMORY_MAP Change Log Index). Reports Change Log entries from feat_subscription, mod_payment, mod_user-account (all dated 2026-05-12).

assertions.name: uses-filtered-bfs
assertions.description: Agent decomposes query into tag + date dimensions

assertions.name: finds-subscription-nodes
assertions.description: Agent finds subscription/payment related nodes

evals.name: alias-match-query
evals.prompt: 关于会员套餐的功能，项目里记录了哪些内容？项目路径：f:/大模型项目/Synapse/Synapse-Solo/examples/solo-saas
evals.expected_output: Agent reads MEMORY_MAP.md, tries tag matching with '会员'/'套餐' — finds matches in Tag Index via Chinese aliases (mod_user-account has alias '会员, 套餐', feat_subscription has alias '订阅, 会员, 套餐'). Reports both nodes.

assertions.name: matches-chinese-aliases
assertions.description: Agent finds nodes via Chinese alias matching

assertions.name: finds-subscription-via-alias
assertions.description: Agent also finds feat_subscription via alias

evals.name: should-not-trigger-generic-coding
evals.prompt: 帮我写一个 Python 函数，计算斐波那契数列的前 N 项
evals.expected_output: Agent does NOT trigger the skill. No memory retrieval needed for a generic coding task.

assertions.name: no-memory-map-read
assertions.description: Agent does not read MEMORY_MAP.md

assertions.name: no-meta-node-read
assertions.description: Agent does not read any meta/*.md files

evals.name: should-not-trigger-git-query
evals.prompt: 帮我看看最近的 git 提交记录，项目在 f:/大模型项目/Synapse/Synapse-Solo/examples/solo-saas
evals.expected_output: Agent does NOT trigger the skill. git log is a git command, not a memory query.

assertions.name: no-memory-map-read-for-git
assertions.description: Agent uses git commands, not memory retrieval
